eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Madison, NE; at 1:13 AM on MAY 28, 2026 Effective until 3:13 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: DANGEROUS SITUATION - EVACUATE IMMEDIATELY - 2ND TO 3RD & PARK TO PASEWALK - GAS LINE HIT BY VEHICLE
